issues.description: Trigger should be 'Activated' (correct), but condition 'Activate: Main' and 'Once Per Turn' are missing. Requires 'conditions' array with timing constraint.
Action type is 'SearchDeck' but effect plays from hand ('Play up to 1 {Neptunian} type Character card or [Megalo]... from your hand'). Should be 'PlayFromHand', not 'SearchDeck'.
Filter is 'Any' but should specify {Neptunian} type OR [Megalo] archetype. Requires proper type/archetype filtering.
Missing prerequisite actions: Rest 1 DON!! card and flip 1 Life card face-up. Must include 'Rest' and 'FlipLife' actions before 'PlayFromHand'.
Missing cost constraint: 'cost equal to or less than the number of DON!! cards on your field'. Requires condition or cost-based filter.
